operational_knowledge_units.title: Ignition Gateway can be accessed through a web browser
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that Ignition can be accessed through a web browser and shows a localhost URL for the Gateway UI/status page.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Ignition Gateway UI / web browser.'
Bullet text: 'Ignition can be accessed through the web browser.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Ignition Gateway UI can be accessed through a web browser. Example URL shown on the slide: http://localhost:8088/web/status/sys.performance?2. This is a UI access/reference concept for Ignition Gateway.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Open the Ignition Gateway UI in a web browser
preconditions: A system hosting Ignition is available
The shown localhost URL is reachable from the machine being used
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide shows the Ignition Gateway UI topic, states that Ignition can be accessed through the web browser, and displays a localhost Gateway/status URL.

steps.expected_outcome: A browser window is available for entering a URL.
steps.validation_check: Browser is open and ready for navigation.
steps.visual_region_hint: Slide bullet stating access is through the web browser.

steps.instruction: Navigate to the displayed Ignition Gateway URL: http://localhost:8088/web/status/sys.performance?2
steps.expected_outcome: The Ignition Gateway UI/status page is opened in the browser.
steps.validation_check: The browser loads the Ignition Gateway page associated with the displayed URL.
steps.visual_region_hint: Displayed URL text near the bottom of the slide.

warnings: The slide provides only a single example URL and does not describe alternate hosts, ports, login requirements, or expected page content in detail.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Navigation candidate: open a web browser and access the Ignition Gateway UI using the displayed URL http://localhost:8088/web/status/sys.performance?2. Based directly on slide text stating Ignition can be accessed through the web browser.
